no service pad
service password-encryption
service timestamps debug datetime msec localtime
service timestamps log datetime msec localtime
service tcp-keepalives-in
service tcp-keepalives-out
!
hostname SW-SEC
!
no ip domain-lookup
no ip http server
no ip http secure-server
no vstack
!
! --- AUTENTICAZIONE LOCALE / ENABLE ---
enable secret {{VAULT:enable_secret}}
username netadmin privilege 15 secret {{VAULT:admin_password}}
aaa new-model
!
! --- AAA RADIUS ---
radius server RADIUS-1
 address ipv4 10.0.0.10 auth-port 1812 acct-port 1813
 key {{VAULT:aaa_servers.key}}
radius server RADIUS-2
 address ipv4 10.0.0.11 auth-port 1812 acct-port 1813
 key {{VAULT:aaa_servers.key}}
aaa group server radius SENTINEL-AAA
 server name RADIUS-1
 server name RADIUS-2
aaa authentication login default group SENTINEL-AAA local
aaa authorization exec default group SENTINEL-AAA local
login block-for 120 attempts 5 within 60
login on-failure log
login on-success log
!
! --- SSH-ONLY MANAGEMENT ---
crypto key generate rsa modulus 2048
ip ssh version 2
ip ssh time-out 60
ip ssh authentication-retries 3
!
! --- VTP ---
vtp mode transparent
!
! --- VLAN DATABASE ---
vlan 10
 name DATA
!
! --- INTERFACCIA DI MANAGEMENT ---
interface Vlan99
 ip address 10.0.99.10 255.255.255.0
 no shutdown
exit
!
! --- SPANNING-TREE ---
spanning-tree mode rapid-pvst
spanning-tree extend system-id
spanning-tree portfast bpduguard default
!
! --- ERRDISABLE AUTO-RECOVERY ---
errdisable recovery cause bpduguard
errdisable recovery cause psecure-violation
errdisable recovery interval 300
!
! --- CDP / LLDP ---
cdp run
lldp run
!
! --- PORTE ACCESS (EDGE) ---
interface range GigabitEthernet1/0/1-24
 switchport mode access
 switchport access vlan 10
 switchport nonegotiate
 spanning-tree portfast
 spanning-tree bpduguard enable
 switchport port-security
 switchport port-security maximum 2
 switchport port-security violation restrict
 switchport port-security aging time 2
 switchport port-security aging type inactivity
 no shutdown
exit
!
! --- NTP ---
ntp server 10.0.0.1
!
! --- LOGGING ---
logging buffered 16384
!
! --- SNMPv3 ---
snmp-server group RO-GRP v3 priv
snmp-server user snmpuser RO-GRP v3 auth sha {{VAULT:snmpv3.auth_pass}} priv aes 128 {{VAULT:snmpv3.priv_pass}}
!
! --- HARDENING VTY / CONSOLE ---
line con 0
 login local
 exec-timeout 5 0
line vty 0 15
 login local
 exec-timeout 5 0
 transport input ssh
!
end
